response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a technically capable full-stack engineer with approximately 17 years of broad software experience, but he does not meet the core requirements for a Principal Engineer in AI Strategy. His AI and ML exposure is minimal and very recent, beginning only with his current role in April 2025 via MCP tooling and agentic workflow infrastructure. He holds no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and his career history reflects senior and staff individual-contributor roles rather than the director-level strategic leadership this position demands. While his entrepreneurial background with GISCollective and his knowledge-sharing activities are genuine positives, they do not compensate for the absence of recognized AI expertise, cloud platform strategy experience at scale, or demonstrated AI-powered products.
strengths: Long career (~17 years) spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput data-integration engineering demonstrates genuine technical breadth
Founder of GISCollective shows entrepreneurial drive and ability to independently build, ship, and sustain a real open-source platform
Active knowledge-sharing through conference talks and multi-day workshops indicates the communication ability relevant to internal and external advising
concerns: AI expertise is superficial and very recent — limited to MCP code generators and agentic framework tooling starting April 2025, far short of 'recognized expertise with demonstrated AI-powered products' the role requires
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI or a related field, and no evidence of formal ML/AI coursework, research, or publications
Career trajectory remains at senior/staff individual-contributor level with no demonstrated director-level scope, strategic customer advisory, or cross-organizational AI influence

key_factors.factor: Years of engineering experience and technical breadth
